scripts.kraki-relay:dev: pnpm exec tsx packages/head/src/cli.ts --port 4000 --auth github --e2e true --log debug
scripts.dev:head: pnpm --filter @kraki/protocol build && pnpm --filter @kraki/crypto build && AUTH_MODE=github E2E_MODE=true PAIRING_ENABLED=true pnpm exec tsx packages/head/src/cli.ts --port 4000
scripts.dev:tentacle: pnpm --filter @kraki/protocol build && pnpm --filter @kraki/crypto build && pnpm exec tsx packages/tentacle/src/cli.ts
scripts.start:head: node packages/head/dist/cli.js
scripts.build:head: pnpm --filter @kraki/protocol build && pnpm --filter kraki-relay build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @kraki/crypto test && pnpm --filter kraki-relay test && pnpm --filter kraki test && pnpm --filter @kraki/tests test
scripts.validate: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @kraki/arm-web test
scripts.reset: rm -rf ~/.kraki && echo '🦑 Cleared ~/.kraki — run pnpm dev:tentacle to set up fresh'
